name: Chocolate Crinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix vegetable oil and melted chocolate until well combined.
2. Gradually add granulated sugar to the mixture, stirring continuously.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Stir in vanilla extract.
5. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt into the batter.
6. Chill the dough for several hours or overnight.
7. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
8. Shape teaspoonfuls of dough into balls and roll them in powdered sugar.
9. Place the coated balls about 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
10. Bake for 10 minutes. Do not overbake.
11. Yield: Approximately 6 dozen cookies.
